underlying_goal: Redesign and enhance a website's visual appearance, including video backgrounds and creating a new version based on a template, then deploy to GitHub
friction_detail: Claude couldn't fetch the React template site or directly view video files, requiring workarounds like ffmpeg frame extraction and user-provided screenshots.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a website's video background, created a V2 based on a template design, ported the improved video bg back to V1, and pushed to GitHub — all achieved successfully.
